title: Output schema of Arabam.com Vehicle Scraper
description: This actor stores scraped vehicle listings and a RUN_SUMMARY record in the default dataset.

vehicleListings.title: Vehicle listings
vehicleListings.description: Structured vehicle listing records from Arabam.com. In Apify Console this opens the overview dataset view by default.

runSummary.title: Run summary
runSummary.description: RUN_SUMMARY dataset row with totals, duration, warnings, and the effective input summary for the scrape.
